headline: What Progressive (PGR)'s Mixed EPS, Cat Losses and 'Anti‑AI Hedge' Label Mean For Shareholders
summary: In recent weeks, analysts at BMO Capital and BofA updated their views on Progressive after an April operating EPS miss tied largely to higher catastrophe losses, while still acknowledging stronger underwriting trends and investment income.
